info.title: Firefly Services Audio and Video API
info.description: This RESTful API provides resources to use Firefly Services AI for audio and video generation and processing.

tags.name: Dynamic Graphics Render
tags.description: Endpoints for Dynamic Graphics Render (DGR): template describe, presets, render, and job status.

tags.name: Translate and lip sync
tags.description: Endpoints for transcribing and dubbing audio/video content.

get.description: This endpoint provides the list of all available voices for the user's enterprise.

post.description: This endpoint generates speech from a transcript. You can provide the transcript either as plain text or a pre-signed URL. The response will include a job ID and a status URL for tracking the job.

requestBody.description: The request body contains the transcript used for generating speech.

get.description: Provides the status and result of an asynchronous job. For Dynamic Graphics Render (DGR), returns the status of a Describe template or Render job.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The job ID of an asynchronous job.

post.description: Analyzes a MOGRT (video template) file and returns a manifest of editable controls; fonts, images, audio, video and other supported values.

Link.description: URL to monitor the status of the job.

get.description: Returns a list of predefined social-first encoding presets for rendering outputs.

value.message: OAuth token is not valid.
API key is required.

post.description: Renders one or more video variations by applying overrides and export presets. Submit up to 10 overrides per call for a subset of editable layers and get a pre-signed URL link to download the video file. For layers that are not editable, the system defaults are automatically applied at export.

source.url: <pre-signed url for image or video asset>

post.description:
This endpoint enables you to reframe video using AI. Provide video input with a pre-signed URL to generate reframed video output. 

This API has more limited capabilities than the v2 endpoint, and may be deprecated soon. **It's recommended to use the v2 endpoint instead.**

url.description: The pre-signed URL pointing to the input source.

source.description: Details of the source including a pre-signed URL. See the [list of allowed domains for storage](https://developer.adobe.com/audio-video-firefly-services/getting-started/storage-solutions/).

sceneEditDetection.description: Apply Scene Edit Detection before reframing.

aspectRatios.description: A list of aspect ratios for the output video.

outputConfig.description: Configuration details for the generated reframed video.

source.url: <pre-signed URL for downloading the video input>
<pre-signed URL for downloading the overlay input>

jobId.description: The unique identifier for the job.

statusUrl.description: The URL to monitor the status of the job.

post.description: Generates transcripts and captions for the input audio or video in the source language or in a target language.
Generate dubbed video or audio. A composited lip sync can also be added for video dubbing.

get.description: Retrieves the list of all available avatars for the user's enterprise.

post.description: This endpoint enables you to reframe the input media. You can provide a video input via a pre-signed URL to generate reframed output video.

width.description: Resolution width of the output in pixels.

height.description: Resolution height of the output in pixels.

output.description: Output configuration details for generating the reframed video.

post.description: Generates an avatar video from a provided transcript or audio file. You can provide the transcript either as plain text or a pre-signed URL. The API is asynchronous, so the response will include a job ID and a status URL for tracking the running job.

requestBody.description: The request body contains the transcript and details for generating an avatar.

voiceId.description: The unique ID for the voice.

displayName.description: The displayed name for the voice.

style.description: The speaking style of the voice.

status.description: This determines if the specific voice ID is available for use. Deprecated voices will have an Inactive status.

extendedPropertyMap.description: This is a field for any additional properties for the voice.

wordsPerMinute.description: The speed of speaking, in words per minute.

sampleURL.description: A pre-signed URL for downloading the sample audio.

avatarId.description: The unique ID for the avatar.

displayName.description: The displayed name for the avatar.

clothingStyle.description: The clothing style worn by the avatar.

ageGroup.description: The intended age bracket of the avatar.

style.description: This property is used when the avatar wears a professional or region-specific costume (like Nurse, Doctor, Emergency Worker, Retail Worker, etc.).

status.description: This determines if the specific avatar ID is available for use. Deprecated avatars will have an Inactive status.

extendedPropertyMap.description: This is a field for any additional properties for the avatar.

hd.description: A pre-signed URL for downloading the high-resolution avatar thumbnail.

lowRes.description: A pre-signed URL for downloading the low-resolution avatar thumbnail.

voiceId.description: The unique ID for the voice.

webm.description: A pre-signed URL for downloading avatar sample video in WEBM format.

mp4.description: A pre-signed URL for downloading avatar sample video in MP4 format.

SupportedLanguageCode.description: The language code for the supported language desired in the result.

SupportedAudioOutputAudioFormat.description: The supported audio format for output.

SupportedOutputVideoFormat.description: The supported video format for background video for Avatar.

SupportedBackgroundType.description: Supported background type for output Avatar video.

mediaType.description: The format of the text resource.

voiceId.description: ID of the voice to use from the catalog of voices.

URLObject.description: URL object containing a pre-signed URL. See the [list of allowed domains for storage](https://developer.adobe.com/audio-video-firefly-services/getting-started/storage-solutions/).

url.description: The pre-signed URL pointing to the resource to be used for avatar/speech generation.

AvatarOutputObject.description: Output configuration for avatar video generation.

color.description: Color code for the background of the output. This should be a six digit hexadecimal value.

SubmitAPIResponse.description: Response returned when a job is successfully submitted.

StatusAPIResponse.description: Response object for job status queries.

error_code.description: The error code returned with the response.

message.description: The error message returned with the response.

messageId.description: The error message ID returned with the response.

url.description: A pre-signed URL pointing to the input template file.

source.description: Contains metadata about the source of the input template.

jobId.description: Unique identifier for the describe job.

statusUrl.description: URL to poll for the status of the describe job.

mediaType.description: MIME type of the output media (e.g., video/mp4).

maxFps.description: Maximum frames per second as a fraction.

targetBitrateInKbps.description: Target bitrate in kilobits per second.

maxBitrateInKbps.description: Maximum bitrate in kilobits per second.

alpha.description: Whether the preset supports alpha channel.

primaryUsage.description: Primary use case for this preset.

url.description: A pre-signed URL pointing to the input template file.

source.description: Contains metadata about the source of the input template.

fonts.description: Array of fonts to be used in the template.

url.description: Pre-signed URL for the font file (.ttf/.otf).

config.description: Configuration options for the render request.

handleMissingFonts.description: How to handle missing fonts. 'fail' will cause the render to fail; 'use_default' will use Premiere Pro fallback behavior.

assets.description: Array of image, video, or audio assets referenced by variations via assetIndex.

url.description: Pre-signed URL for the image, video, or audio asset.

presets.description: Array of export presets. Each item is either a built-in preset (by presetId) or a custom preset (by URL). Outputs reference presets by presetIndex.

presetId.description: ID of a built-in preset from the presets endpoint.

url.description: Pre-signed URL for a custom Encoder preset file.

variations.description: List of variations. Each variation contains variable overrides applied to the template.

variables.description: Variable overrides for this variation. Each object targets one template variable by variableId and supplies the override value.

variableId.description: Unique identifier for the template variable (from describe response).

fontName.description: PostScript font name for text controls.

assetIndex.description: Index into the assets array for media or audio controls.

outputs.description: Defines which variation and preset combinations to render and optional output file names.

variationIndex.description: Zero-based index of the variation to render.

presetIndex.description: Zero-based index of the preset in the presets array.

fileName.description: Optional custom file name for the output.

jobId.description: Unique identifier for the render job.

statusUrl.description: URL to poll for the status of the rendering job.

jobId.description: ID of the render job.

message.description: Error message when job status is failed.

percentCompleted.description: Percentage of job completed, as a string.

outputs.description: Array of output files with destination URLs, keyed by variation and preset indices.

variationIndex.description: Zero-based index of the variation that was rendered.

presetIndex.description: Zero-based index of the preset that was used for rendering.

url.description: URL from which the rendered video can be downloaded.

errors.description: Array of errors for failed variations (only present when status is partially_succeeded).

variationIndex.description: Zero-based index of the variation that failed.

presetIndex.description: Zero-based index of the preset that was used for the failed variation.

fonts.description: Array of fonts from the template.

uploadRequired.description: Whether the font needs to be uploaded in the render request.

elements.description: Array of elements from the template.

controls.description: Array of controls from the template.

variableId.description: Unique identifier for the template variable.

defaultData.description: Default or current values for the control (e.g., text, fontName, selectedCheckboxValue, selectedDropdownValue, selectedSliderValue, scale).

options.description: Available options (object for dropdown; array for checkbox).

range.description: Minimum and maximum values for slider controls.

possibleScaleValues.description: Possible scale values for media controls.

durationInSeconds.description: Duration in seconds for audio controls.

possibleAudioPreferences.description: Possible audio preferences (e.g., replace, mix) for audio controls.

mediaType.description: The media type of the overlay.

url.description: The pre-signed URL pointing to the overlay source.

source.description: Details of the source including a pre-signed URL. See the [list of allowed domains for storage](https://developer.adobe.com/audio-video-firefly-services/getting-started/storage-solutions/).

startTime.description: The start time of the overlay in the video.

duration.description: The duration of the overlay in the video.

anchorPoint.description: The anchor point of the overlay.

offsetX.description: The X offset of the overlay from the anchor point.

offsetY.description: The Y offset of the overlay from the anchor point.

repeat.description: The repeat behavior of the overlay.

Overlay.description: Configuration for an overlay in the reframed video.

sceneEditDetection.description: Applies scene edit detection before reframing.

items.description: Focal point keyword to utilize Semantic Subject Lock. Must be alphanumeric characters, spaces, hyphens, or underscores only. Maximum 1000 characters per keyword.

focalPoints.description: Array of focal point keyword identifiers for reframing. Up to 10 keywords are allowed. Keywords must be alphanumeric characters, spaces, hyphens, or underscores only, with a maximum of 1000 characters per keyword.

externalDocs.description: See documentation for Semantic Subject Lock.

AnalysisV2.description: Analysis configuration for the video processing.

startTime.description: Start time for the overlay in the format HH:MM:SS:FF.

duration.description: Duration of the overlay in the format HH:MM:SS:FF.

anchorPoint.description: Anchor point for taking the position reference.

offsetX.description: Horizontal offset for the anchor point.

offsetY.description: Vertical offset for the anchor point.

RepeatV2.description: Defines the repeat behavior of the overlay.

width.description: The width of the scaled overlay.

height.description: The height of the scaled overlay.

AspectRatioV2.description: Aspect ratio specification for video output.

media.description: Media format for the output video. If only the OTIO file is needed, set this as `none`.

OutputFormatV2.description: Output format configuration. A media property is mandatory when this format object is specified.

overlays.description: List of overlays to be composed on the video.

CompositionV2.description: Configuration for composing elements on the video.
